# API Checklist: Select Location by Clicking on Map

**Purpose**: Validate API requirements clarity, completeness, and coverage for the map-click estimate contract.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/003-uc03-feature-spec/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are request and response schemas fully specified for success, partial-data, resolution error, boundary error, and canceled cases? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
- [x] CHK002 Are error response fields specified for next-step guidance? [Completeness, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK003 Are click precision and range requirements explicitly defined for the API? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK004 Is the canonical location ID requirement expressed with sufficient precision for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK005 Is latest-click-wins behavior defined for API consumers (cancellation semantics)? [Clarity, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK006 Do the API requirements align with UI flow requirements for resolution errors, boundary errors, and partial data warnings? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK007 Are requirements defined for API behavior when clicks are outside the supported boundary (no estimate, reason provided)? [Coverage, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
